unique_vulnerabilities.name: Weak PRNG in luckyNumberOfAddress()

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Uninitialized storage variable in forceReseed()

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Reentrancy in participate()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both Slither and Mythril identify reentrancy issues in the participate() function, specifically around external calls and state changes.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Integer arithmetic bugs in forceReseed()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Mythril identifies multiple integer arithmetic bugs (overflow/underflow) in the forceReseed() function across consecutive lines.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Dependence on predictable environment variable in participate()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both Slither and Mythril identify reliance on predictable environment variables (timestamp/block.number) in the participate() function.
